chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-305 of 2020 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 23.09.2025 Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General ************** This matter was initially fixed on 27.02.2020, when notice was ordered to be issued to the respondents. Thereafter, the matter was fixed on 07.09.2023; on that date, none appeared for the petitioner and the matter was adjourned to 05.10.2023. On 05.10.2023, a brief was held by Mr. Saeed Ahmed, Advocate, on behalf of Mr. Shafqat Raheem Rajput, Advocate for the petitioner, and the matter was adjourned. Thereafter, it was fixed on 01.11.2023; on that date, again none appeared for the petitioner nor any intimation was received. Subsequently, the matter was taken up on 13.12.2023, when once again a brief was held by Mr. Saeed Ahmed, Advocate, on behalf of Mr. Shafqat Raheem Rajput, Advocate for the petitioner, and the matter was adjourned. Today, again, none is present for the petitioner nor any intimation has been received. Record reflects that the present Constitution Petition has been pending since 2020 without any progress, and no sincere efforts have been made by the petitioner to proceed with the matter. It appears that the petitioner and his counsel have lost interest in pursuing the instant petition. Accordingly, the present Constitution Petition stands dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
